name: BTS Core Controller Hub — 6CH Smart Home Board
description: Flagship 6-channel home automation board built for standard industrial deployments. Features optocoupled relay channel outputs, zero-crossing protection, and integration with Alexa, Google Home, and the BTS Smart App.

name: BTS Edge Node Sensor — LoRa Industrial
description: Long-range remote telemetry node for industrial crop monitoring, agriculture, and water level reporting. Built with ultra-low sleep current logic for years of battery deployment.

name: BTS Smart Relay Module 4-Channel Cloud
description: Compact smart switch node designed to fit inside modular home wall boxes. Seamlessly automates existing switches while maintaining manual physical control buttons.

name: BTS Solar Efficiency Monitor Board
description: Advanced solar analytics controller. Measures panel temperature, current degradation, voltage outputs, and uses a specialized optical sensor array to detect dust and alert when cleaning is due.

name: BTS GSM Power Failure Alert Node
description: Real-time telemetry monitor for critical systems (fish tanks, server rooms, medical storage). Immediately sends SMS texts and phone call alerts to registered numbers when main power grid shuts down.

name: BTS Kinetic Art Mirror 64-Servo Driver
description: High-density servo motor controller array designed specifically for interactive silhouette sculptures, kinetic mirrors, and grid matrix control displays.

name: DHT22 Temperature & Humidity Sensor Module
description: High-precision digital temperature and relative humidity sensor. Fully calibrated digital output ensures reliability and stability.

name: Ultrasonic HC-SR04 Distance Sensor
description: Classic ultrasonic rangefinder providing non-contact distance readings. Perfect for level tracking and obstacle mapping.

name: MPU6050 Accelerometer Gyroscope MEMS
description: 6-axis MotionTracking chip combining a 3-axis gyroscope and a 3-axis accelerometer on a single board, featuring an I2C connection.

name: IR Infrared Obstacle Avoidance Sensor
description: Simple proximity sensing module using reflected infrared light beams. Detection sensitivity can be adjusted via onboard trimmer pot.

name: ESP32 DevKit V1 WiFi+BLE Dual-Mode Board
description: Extremely popular low-cost system-on-chip microcontroller development board. Highly integrated with internal antennas and RF balance units.

name: STM32F103C8T6 Blue Pill Development Board
description: High-performance ARM Cortex-M3 microcontroller board offering a massive upgrade over traditional 8-bit chips in speed and pin availability.

name: Arduino Nano V3 ATmega328P CH340
description: Compact development board based on the classic ATmega328P. Simple, rugged, and highly supported by library codes.

name: NodeMCU ESP8266 WiFi IoT Board
description: Open-source firmware and development kit that helps you prototype your IoT products with Lua scripts or Arduino IDE codes.

name: LM2596 DC-DC Step Down Buck Converter
description: Switch-mode step-down voltage regulator board. Features high-efficiency buck transformation and adjustable multi-turn potentiometer.

name: 5V 4-Channel Relay Module with Optocoupler
description: 4-channel active-low relay board. Features galvanic isolation via onboard optocoupler chips to shield microcontrollers from high AC voltage spikes.

name: Breadboard 830 Points MB-102 Solderless
description: Full-size solderless prototyping board. Includes standard double-strip power rails on both sides for clean layout structures.

name: Jumper Wires 120pcs Male-Female Pack
description: Essential connection wire assortment for breadboards and development modules. Flexible multi-color ribbon strip wire assemblies.

name: Digital Multimeter DT-830D Professional
description: Handheld digital multimeter for troubleshooting voltage thresholds, current draws, resistance values, and testing diode/continuity lines.

name: Soldering Iron Kit 60W with 5 Tips
description: Temperature adjustable soldering iron set. Fast heating ceramic element cores, stand assembly, and interchangeable tips included.
